tasks.goal: Survey legacy services (ledger, checkout, merchant-portal) to extract all identifiers, endpoint names, and error codes.

outputs.description: Structured list of all legacy identifiers, endpoints, and error codes from the three services.

tasks.goal: Define the canonical terminology standard (nouns, error vocabulary, casing) based on the legacy survey, outputting only the new terms.

outputs.description: The official Cheonma terminology standard containing only new canonical terms.
A mapping table linking every legacy identifier to its new canonical replacement.

tasks.goal: Write the bilingual (EN/KR) integration tutorial covering checkout, refund, error handling, and migration notes, strictly using the canonical standard.

outputs.description: Bilingual text and code samples for the four required sections, using only canonical terms.

tasks.goal: Validate that all identifiers in the tutorial match the canonical standard exactly and integrate Part A and Part B into the final deliverable.

outputs.description: The complete, validated bilingual developer style guide for Cheonma.
